purpose: Applying probability theory to deflate narratives that require multiple independent institutional prerequisites to materialize simultaneously.
components: Identification of required institutional prerequisites for BRICS dedollarization
current_assessment: The single most effective analytical deflation of the dedollarization narrative across all agents. Survived all four debates. Applicable beyond BRICS to any multi-prerequisite narrative.
limitations: Assumes independence of prerequisites (some may be correlated)
Point probability estimates for individual prerequisites are themselves uncertain
Framework cannot capture gradual institutional evolution vs discrete achievement
